messages.author: gjelsoe
messages.text: I've made a CannedMessage module for MC, it supports Five-way joystick that Radiomaster Bandit has but also single button use, it has been tested on Heltec v3 and patched the so more special chars in Nordic countries shows on the display by adding -DUSE_CP437 Single button navigation uses short press as next and long press as select. To test this code for Heltec v3, compile code for Heltec_v3_companion_radio_ble_canned Look at the PlatformIO.ini for the Heltec v3 under [env:Heltec_v3_companion_radio_ble_canned] to see how you can add it to you device. The code can be accessed here at GitHub. https://github.com/gjelsoe/MeshCore/tree/Bandit_canned_message
messages.content_html: I've made a CannedMessage module for MC, it supports Five-way joystick that Radiomaster Bandit has but also single button use, it has been tested on Heltec v3 and patched the so more special chars in Nordic countries shows on the display by adding -DUSE_CP437 Single button navigation uses short press as next and long press as select. To test this code for Heltec v3, compile code for Heltec_v3_companion_radio_ble_canned Look at the PlatformIO.ini for the Heltec v3 under [env:Heltec_v3_companion_radio_ble_canned] to see how you can add it to you device. The code can be accessed here at GitHub. https://github.com/gjelsoe/MeshCore/tree/Bandit_canned_message
